title: Historical Context of Error Prevention
markdown: # Draft Report for Approach C: Historical Context of Error Prevention ...

sources.title: A History of Software Testing
sources.snippet: The history of software testing dates back to the early days of computing.

sources.title: The Evolution of Software Testing
sources.snippet: The evolution of software testing has included a range of approaches.

sources.title: Software Testing Techniques
sources.snippet: Software testing techniques include black box testing, white box testing, and gray box testing.

sources.title: Agile Testing
sources.snippet: Agile testing is an approach to software testing that emphasizes iterative and incremental testing.

sources.title: Therac-25
sources.snippet: The Therac-25 radiation therapy machine was involved in several accidents in the 1980s due to software errors.

sources.title: Ariane 5
sources.snippet: The Ariane 5 rocket failed on its maiden voyage in 1996 due to a software bug.

sources.title: Software Testing Best Practices
sources.snippet: Thorough testing and validation is essential for robust software development.

sources.title: Error Handling and Recovery
sources.snippet: Error handling and recovery is critical for robust software development.

sources.title: Automated Testing Tools
sources.snippet: Automated testing tools can improve the efficiency and effectiveness of software testing.

claims.text: The history of software testing dates back to the early days of computing, with the first testing methodologies emerging in the 1950s and 1960s.
The evolution of testing methodologies has included a range of approaches, including black box testing, white box testing, and gray box testing.
The Therac-25 radiation therapy machine was involved in several accidents in the 1980s due to software errors.
The Ariane 5 rocket failed on its maiden voyage in 1996 due to a software bug.
Thorough testing and validation, including a range of testing approaches and techniques, is essential for robust software development.
